title: Your 32-Inch Tire Guide: What’s Available Now and What’s Coming Next
summary:
We did the legwork to track down every 32-inch tire currently on the market, along with the ones coming soon to a bike shop near you.

Read the full article at Your 32-Inch Tire Guide: What’s Available Now and What’s Coming Next on Velo.
